10.response: {"Q0":"No it was all clear once you got started."}

0.response: {"Q0":"No strategy, just using my best guess. Not clicking on the yellow planet to save my gold and also not clicking on the blue planet when the astronaut left."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I just hoped gems would be found in the green ice."}

9.response: {"Q0":"I was more focused on learning the sequence that I had to dig in, which became common knowledge in the second half."}

8.response: {"Q0":"Mainly motivated by the chance of winning more than the amount."}
